'?' : location.search;if (window.history && window.history.replaceState) {var ogU = location.pathname + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUQuery + window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash;history.replaceState(null, null,"/atom.xml?__cf_chl_rt_tk=r4qH5KBYbeatL.UfJ2uVtRHGzC5QAC0mRHpqtmlBaGI-1772884350-1.0.1.1-8j4MukLAc119.euols2C0yPofevFX2004fULV7jpJSw"+ window._cf_chl_opt.cOgUHash);a.onload = function() {history.replaceState(null, null, ogU);}}document.getElementsByTagName('head')[0].appendChild(a);}());
